reason: Removing the nullok option from pam_unix entries eliminates the ability to authenticate with an empty password, which aligns with the STIG requirement and does not inherently affect system boot or core services. The change is limited to PAM configuration and can be applied using authselect, minimizing the risk of lockout when performed correctly.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential lockout of accounts that currently rely on empty passwords; Misapplication of the change if authselect profile is not intact
